_comment: Workload calibration for the matching-engine benchmark. These values are compiled into workload/generator.cpp; this file is the human-readable reference. See docs/METHODOLOGY.md.

scenarios.name: static
scenarios.note: Fixed mid-price; the deepest standing book (nothing ever sweeps the resting set). Isolates data-structure occupancy cost; trades sparsely where one-tick modify reprices meet at the mid.

scenarios.name: normal
scenarios.note: Routine intraday session. Canonical — the byte-identical three-baseline consensus is anchored on normal at the canonical seed. All five scenarios have published hashes in reference/correctness_hash.txt.
